events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: cold joint visible between lifts in concrete placement. This is a defect. Need decision fail because non-compliant? Cold joint visible between lifts indicates inadequate bonding, potential plane of weakness, not allowed if not specified/approved. ACI 301/304 require monolithic placement, lift surfaces kept plastic and clean, bonding, if cold joint occurs it may be unacceptable unless approved and treated. So decision fail, risk medium/high? Structural integrity, leakage. Industrial site heavy concrete, cold joint can be plane of weakness and potential leak path. Risk high maybe. component_conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete rough-complete maybe 70? value 0. findings: cold joint between lifts, lack of monolithic bond, potential plane of weakness/leak path. actions: stop placement, evaluate extent, remove/replace or approved repair per engineer, surface prep bonding grout, method statement. references ACI 301, ACI 304. Need include all fields. sound_source etc default empty string/0. order empty list, workable empty list. Ensure valid JSON.

    "Potential plane of weakness and reduced monolithic action",
    "Possible leak path in industrial containment or structural element"

  "actions": [
    "Halt further placement in affected area",
    "Assess full extent of the cold joint and document location",
    "Notify engineer-of-record and quality control",
    "Remove and replace or execute an engineer-approved repair/bonding treatment before continuing"
  ],
  "rationale": "A visible cold joint between lifts indicates the previous lift had set or hardened before the next lift was placed, preventing proper monolithic bonding. Under ACI 301/304, concrete placement must be continuous with properly prepared lift surfaces; an unapproved cold joint is a non-compliant defect that can compromise structural capacity and impermeability in an industrial structure.",
  "references": ["ACI 301", "ACI 304"]
}
